special_mechanics.name: grab_attack
special_mechanics.description: Grappling mechanic central to wrestling gameplay

special_mechanics.name: pinning_system
special_mechanics.description: Victory condition requiring three-count pin or opponent submission

special_mechanics.name: finisher_attacks
special_mechanics.description: Each character has two special attacks: non-grappling technique and finisher

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) contain game design documentation, character information, and regional differences, but no quantified physics parameters. This is a fighting game with wrestling mechanics, not a platformer with jump physics. Movement parameters are not applicable to the game's design paradigm.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Saturday Night Slam Masters (SNES)
